summary: A fair‑but‑clean recording of a tired San Diego gig, highlighted by a superb Last Time > Days > Ashes space amid an otherwise rushed and sloppy set.
review: The show suffers from a hurried first set and a second‑set LSD that many found sloppy, but the post‑space jam (Last Time > Days > Ashes) is praised as the main reason to listen. Recording quality is described as only fair yet clean, though one reviewer feels it doesn’t do the performance justice.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are split (2‑star, 3‑star, 4‑star) with consistent comments about a mediocre recording and uneven performance; the standout jam lifts the overall rating to just above average.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as "only fair, but clean" by one reviewer, while another says the recording "doesn't do this show any justice".

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set feels rushed; second set starts sloppy (LSD) then improves with the post‑space jam, but overall the concert slides downhill toward the drum segment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for twisting a nice space into Last Time > Days > Ashes.
band_member_comments.Drums: The set is said to slide downhill into drums, implying a weaker drum segment.
